<a id="kind-mediaasset"></a>
## MediaAsset

Manage OCI Media Services media assets.

- `Plural`: `mediaassets`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `mediaservices.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/mediaservices/v1beta1/mediaasset.md) (`config/samples/mediaservices_v1beta1_mediaasset.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.

### Spec

MediaAssetSpec defines the desired state of MediaAsset.

| Field | Description | Type | Required | Default | Enum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `bucketName` | The name of the object storage bucket where this asset is located. | `string` | No | - | - |
| `compartmentId` | Compartment Identifier. | `string` | Yes | - | - |

| `displayName` | Display name for the Media Asset. Does not have to be unique. Avoid entering confidential information. | `string` | No | - | - |

| [`locks`](#kind-mediaasset-spec-locks) | Locks associated with this resource. | `list[object]` | No | - | - |

| `namespaceName` | The object storage namespace where this asset is located. | `string` | No | - | - |

| `objectName` | The object storage object name that identifies this asset. | `string` | No | - | - |

| `segmentRangeEndIndex` | The end index for video segment files. | `integer (int64)` | No | - | - |
| `segmentRangeStartIndex` | The start index for video segment files. | `integer (int64)` | No | - | - |
| `sourceMediaWorkflowId` | The ID of the MediaWorkflow used to produce this asset. | `string` | No | - | - |
| `sourceMediaWorkflowVersion` | The version of the MediaWorkflow used to produce this asset. | `integer (int64)` | No | - | - |
| `type` | The type of the media asset. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
